symptoms: fever, chills, muscle aches, cough, fatigue, headache, sore throat
description: Influenza (flu) is a contagious respiratory illness caused by influenza viruses that infect the nose, throat, and lungs.
recommended_action: Rest, fluids, antiviral medication if within 48 hours of onset, over-the-counter fever reducers. See a doctor if symptoms worsen or breathing difficulty occurs.

symptoms: increased thirst, frequent urination, fatigue, blurred vision, slow-healing sores, unexplained weight loss
description: A chronic condition affecting how the body processes blood sugar (glucose), often linked to insulin resistance.
recommended_action: Blood glucose testing, dietary changes, metformin or other prescribed medication, regular monitoring by an endocrinologist.

symptoms: often asymptomatic, headache, shortness of breath, nosebleeds, dizziness
description: Persistently elevated blood pressure that increases risk of heart disease and stroke.
recommended_action: Regular blood pressure monitoring, lifestyle changes (diet, exercise, reduced sodium), antihypertensive medication as prescribed.

symptoms: severe throbbing headache, nausea, sensitivity to light, sensitivity to sound, visual aura
description: A neurological condition causing intense, debilitating headaches often on one side of the head.
recommended_action: Rest in a dark quiet room, prescribed migraine-specific medication (triptans), identify and avoid triggers, consult neurologist for recurrent cases.

symptoms: cough with phlegm, fever, chills, shortness of breath, chest pain when breathing, fatigue
description: An infection that inflames the air sacs in one or both lungs, which may fill with fluid.
recommended_action: Chest X-ray, antibiotics if bacterial, rest and hydration, hospitalization for severe cases especially in elderly or immunocompromised patients.

symptoms: heartburn, regurgitation, chest discomfort, difficulty swallowing, chronic cough
description: A digestive disorder where stomach acid frequently flows back into the esophagus, irritating its lining.
recommended_action: Dietary modification, avoid trigger foods, proton pump inhibitors or H2 blockers, elevate head during sleep.

symptoms: chest pain or pressure, pain radiating to arm or jaw, shortness of breath, sweating, nausea, lightheadedness
description: A range of conditions associated with sudden, reduced blood flow to the heart, including heart attack.
recommended_action: EMERGENCY: Call emergency services immediately. ECG, cardiac enzyme testing, aspirin if not contraindicated, urgent cardiology evaluation.

symptoms: wheezing, shortness of breath, chest tightness, coughing especially at night or early morning
description: A chronic condition in which airways narrow, swell, and produce extra mucus, making breathing difficult.
recommended_action: Use prescribed inhaler (bronchodilator), identify and avoid triggers, spirometry testing, pulmonologist follow-up for persistent symptoms.

symptoms: burning sensation during urination, frequent urge to urinate, cloudy urine, pelvic pain, low fever
description: An infection in any part of the urinary system, most commonly the bladder and urethra.
recommended_action: Urinalysis and culture, prescribed antibiotics, increased fluid intake, follow-up if symptoms persist beyond 48 hours of treatment.

symptoms: persistent sadness, loss of interest, fatigue, sleep disturbances, difficulty concentrating, feelings of worthlessness
description: A mental health disorder characterized by persistently depressed mood and loss of interest in activities.
recommended_action: Psychiatric evaluation, psychotherapy (CBT), consider antidepressant medication, crisis line referral if suicidal ideation present.

symptoms: fatigue, weight gain, cold intolerance, dry skin, constipation, depression
description: A condition in which the thyroid gland does not produce enough thyroid hormone.
recommended_action: Thyroid function tests (TSH, T4), levothyroxine replacement therapy, periodic monitoring by endocrinologist.

symptoms: lower right abdominal pain, nausea, vomiting, loss of appetite, fever, abdominal swelling
description: Inflammation of the appendix that can lead to rupture and peritonitis if untreated.
recommended_action: EMERGENCY: Immediate surgical evaluation. Avoid food and pain medication until assessed. CT scan or ultrasound to confirm diagnosis.

symptoms: joint pain, stiffness, reduced range of motion, swelling, especially after activity
description: Degenerative joint disease caused by breakdown of cartilage, commonly affecting knees, hips, and hands.
recommended_action: Physical therapy, weight management, NSAIDs for pain, joint imaging, orthopedic consultation for advanced cases.

symptoms: fatigue, pale skin, shortness of breath, dizziness, cold hands and feet, brittle nails
description: A condition where the blood lacks adequate healthy red blood cells due to insufficient iron.
recommended_action: Complete blood count, iron studies, iron supplementation, dietary changes, investigate underlying cause of blood loss.

symptoms: sneezing, runny or stuffy nose, itchy eyes, nasal congestion, postnasal drip
description: An allergic response causing cold-like symptoms, triggered by allergens such as pollen or dust.
recommended_action: Antihistamines, nasal corticosteroid sprays, allergen avoidance, allergy testing for persistent cases.

symptoms: fatigue, swelling in legs and ankles, changes in urination, nausea, poor appetite, muscle cramps
description: Gradual loss of kidney function over time, which can progress to kidney failure if untreated.
recommended_action: Blood and urine tests (creatinine, eGFR), blood pressure control, dietary sodium/protein management, nephrology referral.

symptoms: sudden numbness or weakness on one side, confusion, trouble speaking, vision problems, severe headache, loss of balance
description: A medical emergency where blood supply to part of the brain is interrupted, causing brain cell damage.
recommended_action: EMERGENCY: Call emergency services immediately (FAST protocol). CT/MRI brain imaging, time-sensitive thrombolytic therapy if eligible.

symptoms: abdominal pain, bloating, gas, diarrhea or constipation, mucus in stool
description: A common disorder affecting the large intestine, causing chronic digestive symptoms without visible inflammation.
recommended_action: Dietary modification (low FODMAP), stress management, fiber supplements or antispasmodics, gastroenterology follow-up if red-flag symptoms occur.

symptoms: excessive worry, restlessness, muscle tension, fatigue, difficulty concentrating, sleep disturbance
description: A mental health condition characterized by persistent and excessive worry about various aspects of life.
recommended_action: Psychological evaluation, cognitive behavioral therapy, consider anxiolytic or SSRI medication, lifestyle and stress-reduction strategies.

symptoms: redness, itching, discharge, watery eyes, gritty sensation, crusting of eyelids
description: Inflammation or infection of the conjunctiva, commonly known as pink eye, which can be viral, bacterial, or allergic.
recommended_action: Warm compresses, avoid touching/rubbing eyes, antibiotic drops if bacterial, good hygiene to prevent spread.

symptoms: leg swelling, pain or tenderness, warmth in affected area, red or discolored skin
description: Formation of a blood clot in a deep vein, usually in the leg, which can be life-threatening if it travels to the lungs.
recommended_action: EMERGENCY evaluation recommended. Doppler ultrasound, anticoagulation therapy, urgent vascular medicine consultation.
